fundamentals.name: ASML Holding N.V. - New York Re

judgment.summary: Highly profitable, rapidly growing company with strong cash flow, trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 8.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-15.
positives: Return on equity 52.2% — exceptional shareholder returns.
Free cash flow $8.24B — robust cash generation supports growth and dividends.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
Earnings growth 19.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 17.1% indicate strong operational momentum.
negatives: Forward P/E 32.64x and PEG ratio 2.32x — valuation is demanding, priced for continued high growth.
Price/Book 1357.86x and Price/Sales 17.73x — extremely high multiples indicate significant market expectations.
Debt/Equity 12.99% — while leverage is present, it's manageable given strong cash flow.
Beta 1.37 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: ASML Holding NV is highlighted as a top tech stock within billionaire Ken Fisher's portfolio, suggesting strong investor conviction. While no specific catalysts are mentioned, this endorsement from a major fund manager could influence sentiment. Traders should consider the implications of such high-profile backing alongside the stock's existing valuation and growth prospects.

headlines.title: This is Why ASML Holding NV (ASML) is One of the Top Tech Stocks in Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
